building.name: Bird Library
building.note: Map top ≈ true north (345° bearing). Waverly Ave is south side. Einhorn Family Walk exit faces south. Schine Student Center is north.

orientation.description: Bird Library is oriented with its long axis roughly east-west. The top of every floor map corresponds to approximately true north (campus quad / Schine side). Bottom = south (Waverly Ave). Left = west. Right = east.
orientation.northExit: EXIT toward campus quad (top of map)
orientation.southExit: EXIT to Einhorn Family Walk / Waverly Ave (bottom of map)
orientation.eastExit: EXIT on right side of map
orientation.westExit: EXIT on left side of map

zones.name: Quiet Reading Room
zones.description: Large quiet reading room with individual study seating. Includes rooms 008A-008F and 008EA-008EB.

zones.name: Spector Seminar Room
zones.description: Seminar classroom for instruction and events.

zones.name: CLASS - Tutoring & Academic Support
zones.description: Center for Learning and Student Success providing tutoring and academic support.

zones.name: CLASS Office
zones.description: Administrative office for CLASS.

zones.name: Syracuse Abroad @ Bird
zones.description: Syracuse University study abroad information and advising center.

zones.name: Electronic Training Center (ETC)
zones.description: Technology-equipped classroom for electronic training.

zones.name: Open Study Area
zones.description: General open study seating area.

zones.name: LaunchPad - Entrepreneurship and Innovation Hub
zones.description: Blackstone LaunchPad entrepreneurship center supporting student innovation and startup development.

zones.name: Diane and Bob Miron '59 Learning Commons
zones.description: Collaborative learning space with technology and study areas. Heart of the first floor.

zones.name: Pages Café
zones.description: Coffee shop and café with seating area. Located on the east side of the first floor.

zones.name: Pages Café Seating
zones.description: Extended seating area for Pages Café. Vending machines and ATM nearby.

zones.name: Peter Graham Scholarly Commons (PGSC)
zones.description: Scholarly commons space for research and collaboration.

zones.name: Check Out Desk
zones.description: Main circulation desk for checking out and returning library materials.

zones.name: Research and Printing Desk
zones.description: Service desk for research assistance and printing help. Includes rooms 103A and 103B.

zones.name: Open Study Area
zones.description: Large open study area on the first floor with varied seating.

zones.name: Featured Collections
zones.description: Rotating featured collections display area with exhibit case.

zones.name: Vending Machines
zones.description: Vending machines area.

zones.name: Assistive Technology Room
zones.description: Room with assistive technology equipment and resources.

zones.name: Security / Lost & Found / DPS Office
zones.description: Department of Public Safety office. Lost and found items can be retrieved here.

zones.name: Self Check Out Kiosk
zones.description: Self-service kiosk for checking out books.

littleFreeBird.description: Little Free Bird book sharing station

zones.name: FYS - First Year Seminar Office
zones.description: First Year Seminar administrative office. Includes rooms 238A and 238B.

zones.name: Librarian Offices
zones.description: Offices for reference and subject librarians. Includes 200A and 200B.

zones.name: Current Periodicals
zones.description: Current periodicals and magazine reading area.

zones.name: Encyclopedias, Dictionaries, Photography, Reference AE-Z, Oversize AE-D
zones.description: Reference collection including encyclopedias, dictionaries, and photography materials.

zones.name: Philosophy & Psychology
zones.description: Philosophy (BF-BL) and Psychology collections. Call number range B-BE through BF-BL.

zones.name: History
zones.description: History collection. Call number range D through BX.

zones.name: Religion
zones.description: Religion collection. Call number range BX through BS.

zones.name: Newspapers
zones.description: Current newspaper collection.

zones.name: Quiet Computer Area
zones.description: Designated quiet area with computer workstations.

zones.name: Quiet Area
zones.description: Quiet study space on the east side.

zones.name: Dean's Office / Library Administration
zones.description: Library Dean's office and administration. Rooms 219-223.

zones.name: Room 210
zones.description: Multi-purpose room.

zones.name: Map Room
zones.description: Library Map Room with cartographic materials, atlases, and geographic reference resources. Includes rooms 333A, 333B, 333C, 333D.

zones.name: Government Information
zones.description: U.S. Government publications. Part of Federal Depository Library Program for over 140 years.

zones.name: History (North stacks)
zones.description: History collection. Call number range DA through DS.

zones.name: History (Center stacks)
zones.description: History collection continuation. Call number range DA through DS.

zones.name: Geography / Social Sciences
zones.description: Geography and social sciences collection.

zones.name: General Social Sciences
zones.description: General social sciences stacks. Call number range HD through GN.

zones.name: Atlases
zones.description: Atlas collection adjacent to Map Room.

zones.name: Microfilm and Microfiche Reader / Digitization and General Computers
zones.description: Microfilm and microfiche readers, digitization stations, and general-use computers.

zones.name: Checkout to Help / Service Desk
zones.description: Service desk for third floor assistance.

zones.name: Room 348
zones.description: Multi-purpose room.

zones.name: DSS - Digital Scholarship Space
zones.description: Digital scholarship workspace with specialized technology and equipment.

zones.name: Music
zones.description: Music book stacks and collection.

zones.name: Music LPs, Scores, Records
zones.description: Collection of music LPs, scores, and record materials. Call number range HD-HE.

zones.name: Media Playback
zones.description: Media playback stations for audio and video materials.

zones.name: Political Science
zones.description: Political Science collection. Call number range HF through HX.

zones.name: Labor, Communications, Finance, Sociology
zones.description: Collections covering labor studies, communications, finance, and sociology. Call number range HE through HV, then HV through JF.

zones.name: Art & Architecture
zones.description: Art and architecture collection. Call number range NA.

zones.name: Law, Education, Music Books/Scores
zones.description: Collections covering law, education, and music reference materials.

zones.name: Biblio Gallery
zones.description: Exhibition and gallery space for displays and art.

zones.name: Room 463
zones.description: Multi-purpose room near music stacks.

highlights: Center for Teaching and Learning Excellence

zones.name: Languages, Literature, Linguistics
zones.description: Major collection covering languages, literature, and linguistics. Call number range PR through PZ. Spans center and north of the floor.

zones.name: Mower Faculty Commons
zones.description: Faculty-only commons with three reservable meeting/conference rooms. Wellness room with massage chair available.

zones.name: Center for Teaching and Learning Excellence
zones.description: Center supporting faculty teaching development and pedagogical excellence.

zones.name: Fine Arts / Languages
zones.description: Fine arts and additional languages collection.

floors.accessNote: The 6th Floor is only accessible via elevator.

zones.name: SCRC Reading Room
zones.description: Special Collections Research Center reading room. Access by appointment only.

zones.name: Main Gallery
zones.description: Main exhibition gallery for Special Collections displays.

zones.name: Robert Ortwine Gallery
zones.description: Ortwine exhibition gallery space.

zones.name: Brodsky Conservation Lab
zones.description: Conservation laboratory for preservation and restoration of special collections materials.

zones.name: Plastics Pioneers Reading Room
zones.description: Reading room dedicated to plastics history and industry pioneers.

zones.name: Spector Room
zones.description: Meeting and event room.

zones.name: Hillyer Room
zones.description: Meeting and event room.

zones.name: William A. Safire Room
zones.description: Quiet reading and work room named for William Safire.

zones.name: Lemke Seminar Room
zones.description: Seminar room used for Special Collections instruction.

zones.name: Help Desk
zones.description: SCRC help desk for research assistance.

zones.name: Secure Staff Area
zones.description: Restricted staff area for archival storage and processing.

public.note: Public elevators 1, 2, and 3 are on the east side of every floor

staff.note: Staff elevators adjacent to public elevators

compassGuide.description: When the user is inside Bird Library and facing a compass direction, these are the major landmarks and zones they would be facing on each floor. Used for AR camera overlay.

B.west: Spector Seminar Room (004), Open Study Area

1.north: Open Study Area, Assistive Technology (123), Security/DPS (125)
1.east: Miron Learning Commons, Check Out, Research & Printing, Pages Café
1.southeast: Pages Café Seating, ATM, Vending, EXIT
1.south: Peter Graham Scholarly Commons (114), EXIT to Einhorn Family Walk

2.north: FYS Seminar (238), Librarian Offices (200), Open Study Area
2.east: Philosophy & Psychology stacks, Quiet Computer Area, Print/Copy/Scan
2.south: Dean's Office / Library Administration (221), History stacks
2.west: Current Periodicals, Newspapers, Open Study Area

3.north: Open Study Area, History stacks (DA-DS), Study rooms 300-306
3.south: General Social Sciences (HD-GN), Open Study Area, Study rooms 320-325

4.north: Music LPs/Scores, Political Science, Labor/Communications/Finance, Open Study Area
4.south: Art & Architecture, Open Study Area, Study rooms 420-425
4.west: DSS Digital Scholarship (458), Music stacks, Media Playback

5.northeast: Mower Faculty Commons (548), Study rooms 500-506, EXIT
5.east: Center for Teaching & Learning Excellence (550), Public Elevators, Self Check Out
5.south: Fine Arts/Languages, Open Study Area, Study rooms 524-525

6.east: SCRC Reading Room, Main Gallery (600), Help Desk, Lemke Seminar Room
6.south: Spector Room (608), Hillyer Room (606), Brodsky Conservation Lab
